title: Shared Features Manifest
description: Authoritative list of features that have been migrated to @ramcar/features. Drives the CI duplication check (scripts/check-shared-features.ts).

$schema.description: Reference to this schema for editor tooling.

features.description: Features that have been migrated to @ramcar/features. Each entry forbids non-reexport code under apps/*/src/features/<name>/.

allowList.description: Paths under apps/*/src/features/<X>/ that are exempt from the duplication check (e.g., page-only wiring that must stay in-app).

name.description: Directory name under apps/*/src/features/ that the check watches.

migratedAt.description: Day the feature was moved to @ramcar/features (YYYY-MM-DD).

package.description: Subpath import where the feature is now available.

notes.description: Free-form rationale or migration PR link.
